cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park. Let's start by going through each of the given pieces of information step by step. First, Anthony woke up at 6am. Then, Leslie saw him reading at the library from 6am to 8am. So, during that time, he was at the library. Next, Jennifer saw him working out at the gym from 8am to 9am. That means from 8 to 9, he was at the gym. Then, Anthony saw Anthony (probably a typo, maybe another person like a friend or a different witness) buying cookies at a bakery from 2pm to 9pm. Wait, that's a long time—2pm to 9pm. So during that entire window, Anthony was at the bakery buying cookies? That seems like a long time to be doing that, but let's take it as given. Then, William saw Anthony buying a bike at the bike shop from 9pm to 10pm. And the amusement park was closed after 10pm. So, let's piece together Anthony's schedule: - 6am to 8am: at the library (Leslie) - 8am to 9am: at the gym (Jennifer) - 9am to 2pm: not mentioned, so maybe free time - 2pm to 9pm: at the bakery (Anthony saw Anthony) -
